name: Peanut Butter Fudge (Miller)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook sugar, butter, evaporated milk, and salt to a soft ball stage (234 - 238 F).
2. Add marshmallows and peanut butter just before removing from heat.
3. Do not stir. Allow the mixture to cool to room temperature.
4. Add flavoring. Beat until the mixture is creamy, thick, and will hold its shape when dropped from a teaspoon.
5. Pour into a well-buttered, shallow pan.
6. Cut into squares.
